programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: For seven years, a trio of men robbed one bank after another. They always got away before the police arrived and they left no evidence behind. But the way they stood and the clothes they wore told a story that could be read by forensic scientists.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'Em Up
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'Em Up
programme.desc: Residents of Noel, Missouri were stunned to learn that their bank had been robbed and the bank president was missing. His body was later found floating in a lake, securely bound to a chair with duct tape.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: The body of 16-year-old Leanne Tiernan was discovered nine months after she disappeared. Forensic scientists found clues that painted a virtual portrait of her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: California police had several suspects in the robbery and brutal murder of an elderly couple. Ten years later, a determined forensic scientist used material from a dentist's office to uncover ballistic evidence that had been overlooked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Buried Treasure
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Badge of Betrayal
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Matrimony
programme.desc: A go-go dancer told her family she needed to get away for a while and then she simply disappeared. Investigators were suspicious, because she took neither her car nor her clothes. 20 years later, her family received a call that changed everything.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muddy Waters
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: The New Detectives

programme.title: The New Detectives: Blood Money
programme.desc: Some people murder for love. But these killers did it for the money. When greed is the motive, investigators must make every clue pay off.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Murder By Numbers
programme.desc: For serial killers, once is never enough. For investigators, the challenge is steep when the killers murder by numbers.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Federal Offense
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Flames Of Justice
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Trails of Evidence
programme.desc: In criminal investigations, a simple clue can provide the missing link by placing a suspect at a crime scene. Dirt left on shoes, tires or clothes, or even a tiny piece of plastic can pinpoint a crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Missing
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives: In The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Bombers, snipers, spree killers: some people don't care who they kill, they just want to hurt innocent people.

programme.title: The New Detectives: For Love Or Money
programme.desc: Every family has its secrets, and sometimes blood relations lead to bloodshed. When money is the motive, murder can rip at the very foundation of marriage and family.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Left At The Scene
programme.desc: The tiniest residue left at the scene can become a mark of distinction in the most singular and intimate of ways.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Invisible Death
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Written In Bone
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Blooded
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Blooded
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Fatal Error
programme.desc: Accidental deaths, suicides, disappearances, and fires; they're an everyday part of an insurance investigator's life. But cases shouldn't be taken at face value. Forensics has become a tool for exposing insurance fraud.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Dead In The Water
programme.desc: Drowning deaths often look like accidents and water can destroy the scant clues the killer may have left behind. Investigators must turn to forensic science to solve cases where the victim is found dead in the water.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Scent Of The Kill
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bloodlust
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bloodlust
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Aim
programme.desc: Ballistic analysis is the key to finding killers who turn guns on their victims. Each shot fired leaves its own "fingerprint", allowing scientists to target murderers with deadly aim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Identity
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs, microscopic fibers, a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Three hairs, microscopic fibers, a common trash bag ripped from a roll. Seemingly small and insignificant clues become a victim's silent witness.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly intentions
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Patterns Of Guilt
programme.desc: The tread of a tire, a single shoe print and even the shape of a bruise help investigators track down killers, based solely on their patterns of guilt.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Deadly Smile
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: "To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth."

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: "To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth."

programme.title: The New Detectives: The Unforgotten
programme.desc: Years after a murder has been committed, investigators use advanced DNA analysis to shed new light on crimes that have gone unpunished for far too long.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Star Crossed (REDUX)
programme.desc: Travis and Callie are hired by the Jup-Fed to arrest Dakkota 79, a Raider leader on the verge of starting a war with the Verran Clan. Rudolfo's inquiry into a possible bounty on Travis leads to complications with his new crewmates.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Biocrime (REDUX)
programme.desc: Travis is hired to apprehend Father Abode, a former student of Dr. Novak, who has been producing genetic mutants for the sexual pleasure of wealthy clients. The chase reveals dark information about Marcus's past.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Chasing Janus (REDUX)
programme.desc: During a 'sting' operation, Callie is critically wounded. The crew of the Tulip race against the clock to track down her powerful family, who may have the means to save her.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Spaceman (REDUX)
programme.desc: While exploring a debris field, the Trans-Utopian discovers a sarcophagus floating in space. Mishkin, the lone occupant, spreads an experimental mind-warping disease among the crew that empowers their alter-egos and cause dangerous conflicts.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Becoming Shiva (REDUX)
programme.desc: A Terran terrorist group protesting the ecological disasters that have plagued them detonate a bomb on the city state space station, Ring Sheppard. The crew are hired to track them down and break the ring up. More easily said than done.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: The Third Thing (REDUX)
programme.desc: The the in-brain reality TV series "The Third Thing", follow the crew of the Trans-Utopian. Marcus, is given the job of capturing a petty criminal for the show. As the "simple" mission unfolds, it becomes much deadlier than it seemed.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Torment (REDUX)
programme.desc: Percy, Travis, and crew try to rescue a man's parents caught in a cruel time-dilation trap; kidnapped years earlier into a high-speed orbit, they only age 8 months relative to their son's 50 years.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Painless (REDUX)
programme.desc: Roan, a friend of the Montana family, is killed by Anestha, a new street drug. As Travis hunts for Bliss, a narcotics ringleader, he stumbles upon a deep scam that could only happen in the 23rd century.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Skin Deep (REDUX)
programme.desc: Callie's reunion with old friend Lena goes awry when a rival starhunter attempts to arrest Lena for murder. Percy and Marcus leave the ship to buy an anti-matter stabilizer, but the deal goes poorly and the two find themselves stranded in Io's Syn City.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Supermax Redux (REDUX)
programme.desc: While transporting Quigley, a prisoner who appears to be quite insane, the crew save the lives of an old nemesis and his associates. Max offers to share a stash of Onmium, a mineral rarer than diamonds and worth billions.

programme.title: Starhunter Redux: Pandora's Box (REDUX)
programme.desc: The Trans-Utopian experiences a power drain caused by Keres Station research facility. Not knowing they are the cause, Travis accepts an assignment from their head scientist to capture the Raider Quennell and retrieve a sample of the deadly Tethys Virus.

programme.title: Dark Matter: I've Seen the Other Side of You
programme.sub-title: I've Seen the Other Side of You
programme.desc: After placing a severely injured Six in stasis, the crew of the Raza attempt to throw the G.A. off their trail by laying low in an unoccupied region of space.

programme.title: Dark Matter: We Were Family
programme.desc: When the crew of the Raza stop at the Janah 12 spacestation to resupply, Three is reconnected with his former crew. The Android also ventures onto the space station where she encounters an underground community of androids.

programme.title: Dark Matter: We Voted Not to Space You
programme.sub-title: We Voted Not to Space You
programme.desc: With Six recovering from surgery, the rest of the crew turn their attention to finding One's killer. The Android uses a pirated upgrade to go undercover as a human and discovers that Jace Corso pulled the trigger.

programme.title: Dark Matter: We Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.sub-title: We Should Have Seen This Coming
programme.desc: Strapped for cash, the crew of the Raza is looking for a job and Nyx has a target in mind, a freighter carrying a valuable drug called shadow. Once onboard the ship, however, it is revealed that the freighter is no random target.

programme.title: Dark Matter: She's One of Them Now
programme.desc: Tired of playing catch up, the crew tracks down their handler, Tabor Calchek, so they can go on the offensive against the mysterious Alicia Reynaud.

programme.title: Dark Matter: She's One of Them Now
programme.desc: Tired of playing catch up, the crew tracks down their handler, Tabor Calchek, so they can go on the offensive against the mysterious Alicia Reynaud.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Stuff to Steal, People to Kill
programme.sub-title: Stuff to Steal, People to Kill
programme.desc: The first test run of the ship's Blink Drive goes awry, accidentally transporting The Raza to a parallel reality. With the Blink Drive damaged beyond repair, the crews' only hope is to steal the only other version in existence.

programme.title: Dark Matter: Going Out Fighting
programme.desc: After collapsing in her quarters Two learns that her nanites are failing. In order to save her life, the crew of The Raza must pull off a dangerous op inside the headquarters of Dwarf Star Technologies.

programme.desc: When the Android experiences a dream for the first time, she is compelled to inform the crew she may be malfunctioning. After members of the crew begin to be affected in strange ways, it becomes clear they are facing a larger threat.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: House Divides
programme.desc: James e Gaz vengono alle mani e i successivi litigi, altrettanto esplosivi, costringono Gaz a lasciare la casa. Ma essere bandito in fin dei conti non e' cosi' male.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky Meets Dan
programme.desc: Mentre il ragazzo piu' palestrato d'America manda le ragazze in testacoda, la casa raggiunge lo sfascio piu' totale. Charlotte ha un'epifania, Vicky va in estasi e Scotty T gode della sua punizione.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Vicky Meets Dan
programme.desc: Mentre il ragazzo piu' palestrato d'America manda le ragazze in testacoda, la casa raggiunge lo sfascio piu' totale. Charlotte ha un'epifania, Vicky va in estasi e Scotty T gode della sua punizione.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Anger Management
programme.desc: E' il compleanno di James e i ragazzi organizzano un viaggio a sorpresa a Dublino per festeggiare con un ospite segreto! Ma al ritorno, Ricci riceve una notizia scioccante.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Anger Management
programme.desc: E' il compleanno di James e i ragazzi organizzano un viaggio a sorpresa a Dublino per festeggiare con un ospite segreto! Ma al ritorno, Ricci riceve una notizia scioccante.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Haunted House
programme.desc: La competizione con Gaz provoca un litigio tra Aaron e Scott. Charlotte svela a Holly il motivo che ha rovinato la sua amicizia con Kyle. E al toga party Chloe e Scott sono più vicini che mai.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Haunted House

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Pie Shop Argument
programme.desc: James e Gary si prendono a botte: questo crea un'onda d'urto nella casa. Charlotte offre il suo aiuto a Gary.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Goodbye Australia
programme.desc: La partenza da Sidney si avvicina e i singles decidono di uscire per una notte di follia, per gli accoppiati e' il momento della verita'.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 7
programme.desc: Richard opfylder en barndomsdrøm og prøvekører to superbiler fra 80'erne. James prøvekører NASA's seneste rumudforskningskøretøj.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 1
programme.desc: Jeremy holder 50-års jubilæum for den legendariske Jaguar E-type, og James kører om kap med en OL-guldmedaljevinder i maskotter.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 2
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard og James tager til Italien til en række udfordringer og højrøstede skænderier for at se, hvad der er verdens bedste hatchback.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 4
programme.desc: Top Gear-gutterne forsøger at lave deres eget "tog" med en bil, der trækker en række campingvogne. Rowan Atkinson er stjernen i den prisbillige bil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 5
programme.desc: Jeremy, Richard og James vælger nedrivningsmaskiner, og Bob Geldof er stjernen i den prisbillige bil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 6
programme.desc: Jeremy og James tester to elektriske biler på en tur til stranden, og Richard møder verdens mest usædvanlige racerkørere.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 1
programme.desc: Vi er i Italien og filmer superbiler, tager en nervepirrende tur gennem Roms centrum og besøger den legendariske Imola-bane.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 2
programme.desc: Vi ser på Kinas voksende bilindustri, NASCAR-løb i Texas og Mercedes SLS Roadster. Med Matt Le Blanc.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 3
programme.desc: Holdet overtager optagelserne af Sweeneys klimatiske biljagt, og Hollywood-skuespilleren Ryan Reynolds er »stjernen i den prisbillige bil.«

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 4
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May indleder et ambitiøst projekt med at bygge mobilitetsscootere, der kan klare det britiske landskab.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 5
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson og James May hylder den svenske bilproducent Saab. Richard Hammond kører racerløb i en rallyspecifik Skoda mod en raketdrevet flyvende mand.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 6
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May kører mod Donington i tre strippede banevogne. Og Jeremy genskaber slaget om Storbritannien i en Bentley.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 7
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond og James May vil finde ud af, om du kan køre motorløb for mindre, end det koster at spille golf. Slash og F1-køreren Kimi Raikkonen er gæst.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 1
programme.desc: Jeremy bygger en bil, der er endnu mindre en den berømte Peel P50, og så sælger han konceptet til de frygtede "drager".

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 1
programme.desc: Jeremy bygger en bil, der er endnu mindre en den berømte Peel P50, og så sælger han konceptet til de frygtede "drager".

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 2
programme.desc: I USA kører Top Gear-gutterne af sted mod den mexicanske grænse i en Lexus LFA, en Dodge Viper og en Aston Martin Vanquish.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 2
programme.desc: I USA kører Top Gear-gutterne af sted mod den mexicanske grænse i en Lexus LFA, en Dodge Viper og en Aston Martin Vanquish.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 3
programme.desc: Jeremy kører ræs fra Wembley til San Siro-stadion i Milano i en Shelby Mustang GT500, mens Richard og James tager den paneuropæiske jernbane.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 3
programme.desc: Jeremy kører ræs fra Wembley til San Siro-stadion i Milano i en Shelby Mustang GT500, mens Richard og James tager den paneuropæiske jernbane.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 4
programme.desc: Jeremy prøvekører den nye Kia Cee'd med hjælp fra sine kendte venner, og F1-stjernen Lewis Hamilton er på banen i en prisbillig bil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 4
programme.desc: Jeremy prøvekører den nye Kia Cee'd med hjælp fra sine kendte venner, og F1-stjernen Lewis Hamilton er på banen i en prisbillig bil.

programme.title: Top Gear: Afsnit 5
programme.desc: Jeremy og Richard forsøger at designe en bil, der sigter mod ældre par, mens James prøvekører den nye Range Rover.

programme.desc: Jeremy og Richard forsøger at designe en bil, der sigter mod ældre par, mens James prøvekører den nye Range Rover.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: A estrela locutora de notícias Kiyomi Takada se torna a porta-voz mundial de Kira.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light tem como objetivo investigar Kiyomi, enquanto os integrantes do corpo especial escutam pelo auto-falante.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Aizawa percebe o que está acontecendo e alerta Near, o qual já sabia sobre as notas.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light dá a Kiyomi a ordem para matar Near.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: De acordo com o acerto, Near e o SPK se encontram com Light e o corpo especial em um armazém.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Embora Mikami tenha escrito os nomes de todos no Death Note, estavam vivos. Near consegue o Death Note e tudo é revelado.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: O brilhante, mas entediado estudante da escola Light Yagami encontra-se mantendo o poder da vida e da morte em suas mãos, o Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Enquanto os criminosos do mundo continuam a morrer, L atende representantes de várias nações.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Ryuk o Shinigami que deixou cair o Death Note no mundo humano, avisa a Light que alguém está no seu encalço.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light, conhecido mundialmente como Kira, prova a extensão dos poderes do Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Soichiro Yagami exige uma reunião em pessoa com L quando ele descobre que ele secretamente levou agentes do FBI para o Japão.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light se reune com uma mulher no departamento de polícia, pois tem uma mensagem importante para o Kira.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light usa o Death Note para tentar se livrar de uma mulher que poderia ter levado para a prisão.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: L coloca microfones e câmeras nas casas dos membros do grupo especial, incluindo a casa de Yagami, mas Light dá um passo a frente.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Os assassinatos continuam, e L começa a suspeitar do comportamento perfeito de Light que então decide investigar por conta própria.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: As suspeitas de L estão cada vez maior, e Light o convence a convidá-lo para a investigação.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Como previsto nas fitas enviadas a TV Sakura, apresentadores e comentaristas de notícias expressaram suas dúvidas sobre a morte de Kira.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Com um segundo Kira solto, L pede Light para se unir ao grupo especial para descobrir o paradeiro do verdadeiro Kira.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light viaja a Aoyama para descobrir a identidade do segundo Kira antes que L suspeite mais ainda.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light e Misa mostram seus Death Notes, então Light pede que Misa use sua Rem Shinigami para se livrar de L.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Há evidências que apontam para Misa Amane como o segundo Kira.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Misa está presa, embora suas lembranças do Death Note tenham sido excluídas.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Após 50 dias presos os assassinatos continuam, Misa e Light são soltos.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Apesar de L ainda ser suspeito, Light e Misa (suas memórias de terem sido Kira foram apagadas) voltam ao quartel.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Matsuda, o elemento do corpo especial encarregado de monitor Misa, decide espionar por conta própria

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: A equipe de L descobre que o Grupo Yotsuba está reunida em segredo para discutir a eliminação dos indivíduos que são problemáticos para a sua empresa.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: O Grupo Yotsuba contrata Eraldo Bobina para descobrir a identidade de L.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Misa consegue sucesso ao reduzir a um suspeito a identidade de Kira dentro do Grupo Yotsuba: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Misa consegue sucesso ao reduzir a um suspeito a identidade de Kira dentro do Grupo Yotsuba: Higuchi.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Higuchi do Grupo Yotsuba, tenta matar Matsuda do corpo especial.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Higuchi do Grupo Yotsuba, tenta matar Matsuda do corpo especial.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Higuchi é capturado e conta aos investigadores tudo sobre o Death Note.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light recuperou suas memórias, em seguida dá ordens a Misa que retome os assassinatos.

programme.title: Death Note
programme.desc: Light removeu todos os obstáculos de seu caminho, e está perto de alcançar o seu mundo perfeito.

programme.desc: Aparece um novo investigador, Near, uma figura central na SPK, uma organização dedicada a pegar Kira sem depender de L.

programme.desc: Light atuando como L, revela a Near que sua irmã Sayu foi raptada por alguém que quer trocá-la por um Death Note.

programme.title: South Park: La ciudad que es parte del pueblo
programme.sub-title: La ciudad que es parte del pueblo
programme.desc: La ciudad de South Park se está aburguesando y Kenny cree que es hora de conseguir un empleo.

programme.title: South Park: No eres Yelp
programme.desc: Cartman se considera el crítico culinario online más importante de South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Espacio seguro
programme.desc: Cartman es la última víctima de los complejos corporales.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek y Craig
programme.desc: Las chicas asiáticas del colegio hacen unos dibujos geniales de Tweek y Craig.

programme.title: South Park: Ninjas perversos
programme.desc: Los vecinos de South Park deciden que la ciudad ya no necesita tener cuerpo de policía.

programme.title: South Park: Contenido patrocinado
programme.desc: La integridad de Jimmy como periodista choca contra la ideología del director PC.

programme.title: South Park: Verdad y propaganda
programme.desc: El director PC desaparece junto con dos de los alumnos de cuarto.

programme.title: South Park: La justicia final del director PC
programme.sub-title: La justicia final del director PC
programme.desc: Kyle antepone una peligrosa alianza a su amistad con Stan.

programme.title: South Park: Glorias pasas
programme.desc: En el primer capítulo de la temporada 20, un icono estadounidense hace una nueva versión del himno nacional.

programme.title: South Park: Caza putas
programme.desc: El padre de Kyle se las arregla para mantener en secreto su identidad de troll mientras acosa a todo el mundo por internet.

programme.title: South Park: Los condenados
programme.desc: Gerald está encantado con la atención de los medios mientras sigue acosando a más y más gente.

programme.title: South Park: Pitos fuera
programme.desc: Los chicos se unen para defender sus derechos.

programme.title: South Park: Basura y un danés
programme.desc: Giant Douche no quiere salir en las elecciones presidenciales.

programme.title: South Park: Fort Collins
programme.desc: Han hackeado una ciudad entera de Colorado. Gerald y Cartman pueden quedarse sin nada cuando todo su historial de internet se hace público.

programme.title: South Park: Ay, Dios
programme.desc: Gerald se encuentra cara a cara con el cazador de trolls.

programme.title: South Park: Exclusivo para miembros
programme.desc: El Nuevo presidente electo hace una visita a su ciudad natal.

programme.title: South Park: No es gracioso
programme.desc: Cartman está convencido de que Butters intenta quitarle a su novia.

programme.title: South Park: El fin de la serialización tal como lo conocemos
programme.sub-title: El fin de la serialización tal como lo conocemos
programme.desc: Cartman por fin entiende por qué Heidi quiere llevarlo a Marte.

programme.title: South Park: Blancos que reforman casas
programme.desc: Randy asume lo que significa ser blanco en la sociedad actual.

programme.title: South Park: Guarda el móvil
programme.desc: South Park es el nuevo objetivo de Corea del Norte.

programme.title: South Park: Especial Colón
programme.desc: Surge un vínculo innegable entre un hombre blanco y un nativo americano.

programme.title: South Park: La precuela de la saga
programme.desc: Facebook es el arma definitiva del Profesor Caos.

programme.title: South Park: Figuritas y heroína
programme.desc: Las muertes por sobredosis de opiáceos se han convertido en una epidemia entre los jóvenes animadores infantiles. Stan está a punto de ser señalado como el origen de los fármacos ilegales.

programme.title: South Park: Hijos de bruja
programme.desc: En la cita anual previa a Halloween, una bruja hace un conjuro que tiene aterrorizado a todo South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Te lo dije
programme.desc: Kyle juega con fuego al meterse en la relación de Cartman y Heidi. / Kyle juega con fuego al interponerse entre Cartman y Heidi.

programme.title: South Park: Osos de agua
programme.desc: El experimento de Jimmy y Timmy podría ganar el primer premio de la feria de la ciencia de este año.

programme.title: South Park: Las tetas de bebe destruyen la sociedad
programme.sub-title: Las tetas de bebe destruyen la sociedad
programme.desc: Bebe es la primera chica de cuarto en 'desarrollarse', lo que pone en peligro su amistad con los chicos y a la sociedad en general.

programme.title: South Park: El secuestro infantil no tiene gracia
programme.sub-title: El secuestro infantil no tiene gracia
programme.desc: Para intentar proteger a sus hijos de los secuestradores, los padres contratan al dueño de City Wok para que construya la Gran Muralla de South Park.

programme.title: South Park: El retorno de la Comunidad del anillo a las dos torres
programme.sub-title: El retorno de la Comunidad del anillo a las dos torres
programme.desc: Los chicos emprenden una misión para devolver 'El señor de los anillos' al videoclub mientras que Butters ve su primera peli porno.

programme.title: South Park: Don PC en apuros
programme.desc: Nunca ha sido tan difícil ser un director políticamente correcto.

programme.title: South Park: Tomatazo
programme.desc: Los niños de South Park aseguran que han visto al sr. Garrison merodeando por el pueblo. Los ciudadanos están hartos de que el presidente atemorice a sus hijos.

programme.title: South Park: Niños muertos
programme.desc: Randy intenta desesperadamente ayudar a Sharon a controlar sus emociones, y Cartman suspende el examen de matemáticas contra todo pronóstico.

programme.title: South Park: El niño y el cura
programme.desc: Ha surgido una relación muy especial entre Butters y el Padre Maxi. Cuando los feligreses se encuentran con la puerta de la iglesia de South Park cerrada a cal y canto y el párroco desaparece, deciden llamar a la Iglesia Católica.

programme.title: South Park: Un mojón en apu-ros
programme.desc: El comportamiento ofensivo del sr. Mojón hace peligrar su puesto de director de la función de Navidad. Mientras tanto, en el colegio de South Park, la relación entre Mujer Fuerte y don PC se enfrenta a nuevos obstáculos.

programme.title: Becker DE: Das Schreiben wird unterbochen
programme.desc: Becker verspricht einem Freund, einen medizinischen Artikel für ihn zu schreiben, aber er wird ständig von Problemen unterbrochen. Linda hat keine Bleibe, und Jake beschließt, seine Freundin Amy zu verlassen.

programme.title: Becker DE: In Larrys Namen
programme.desc: Becker lernt einen Patienten kennen, der behauptet, mit Gott zu sprechen, den er Larry nennt. Becker schickt ihn sofort zu einem Psychiater, aber ein Unfall lässt Becker glauben, dass Larry vielleicht doch zuhört.

programme.title: Becker DE: Ein chronisches Leiden
programme.desc: Reggies Begeisterung für ein Buch, das eine gesündere Lebensweise verspricht, schwindet, als sich herausstellt, dass die Autorin Beckers Ex-Frau Sandra ist. Das gesamte Buch basiert auf dem Schaden, den Becker ihr zugefügt hat.

programme.title: Becker DE: Gebote und Vorschriften
programme.desc: Beckers Überzeugung, dass die moderne Erziehung den Kindern keine Grenzen setzen kann, wird erschüttert, als eine Patientin ihn bittet, auf ihre Kinder aufzupassen. Bald wird ihm klar, dass gute Erziehungsmethoden wirklich schwer zu erreichen sind.

programme.title: Becker DE: Partielles Recht
programme.desc: Als Beckers Computer aus seiner Wohnung gestohlen wird und seine Versicherung nicht ausreicht, bittet er Bob um Hilfe, um durch ein dubioses Geschäft einen neuen, erstklassigen Computer zu bekommen. Doch Bob hat seine eigenen Pläne.

programme.title: Becker DE: Zwei Minuten
programme.desc: Beim Abendessen mit seinem nervigen Cousin Berry und dessen Frau Melissa verliert Becker die Geduld und berichtet ungewollt von Berrys Untreue.

programme.title: Becker DE: Sie sagten: "Fahr."
programme.desc: Beckers Patient Jimmy ist ein mittelloser Händler, der sich die Behandlung seines Geschwürs nicht leisten kann. Als Entschädigung bietet er Becker Karten für das Spiel der Mets am selben Abend an. Kann Becker es rechtzeitig schaffen?

programme.title: Becker DE: Ein Glückstag
programme.desc: Becker ist begeistert, als am Morgen alle Ampeln auf grün stehen und er einen erstklassigen Parkplatz vor dem Diner ergattert. Doch er ist davon überzeugt, dass je mehr Glück ihm geschieht, desto schlimmer die Konsequenzen ausfallen werden.

programme.title: Becker DE: Nimm doch Reggie!
programme.desc: Als Jake auf dem Weg zu seiner Freundin ist, warnt Becker ihn, dass sein Reißverschluss offen ist. Jake hält das für einen Streich und weigert sich, darauf hereinzufallen. Zu Beckers Überraschung belügt Reggie Jake hinsichtlich seines Aussehens.

programme.title: Becker DE: Kekse und Fäustlinge
programme.desc: Becker kommt seinen ärztlichen Pflichten im Diner nach und bewahrt eine Frau vor dem Ersticken. Allerdings werden seine Bedenken größer, als sie im Büro und in seiner Wohnung erscheint, um Geschenke und Glückwünsche zu überbringen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Besser als Sex
programme.desc: Becker versucht, mit dem Rauchen aufzuhören. Letztendlich findet er ein neues Verlangen: Sex. Außerdem ist Reggie enttäuscht, als sie ihr Leben überdenkt. Sie beschließt, in Teilzeit wieder aufs College zu gehen, um ihren Abschluss zu machen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Was Frauen wünschen ...
programme.desc: Linda bekommt eine kleine Schwester und lernt eine Lektion über das Rebellieren. Außerdem mischt sich Becker in Reggies Liebesleben ein.

programme.title: Becker DE: Die Wahrheit über Linda
programme.desc: Wir erfahren mehr über Lindas Herkunft und bekommen einen Einblick in ihre Welt, nachdem sie durch eine Reihe von Missgeschicken ihren Job kündigte.

programme.title: Becker DE: Mein Freund ist zurück
programme.desc: Reggie verfolgt einen Highschool-Traum, indem sie sich erneut mit einem Schwarm trifft. Außerdem ist Becker eifersüchtig auf einen alten Kollegen, der reich und berühmt ist. Allerdings erkennt er, dass er seinen Beruf wählte, um Menschen zu helfen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Umleitung nach Buffalo
programme.desc: Als Becker und Reggie beschließen, nach Chicago zu gehen, nutzen Bob und Jake die Gelegenheit, um im Diner ein wenig Geld zu verdienen. Außerdem beschließen Linda und Margaret, im Büro die Füße hochzulegen und sich die Nägel zu lackieren.

programme.title: Becker DE: Viel Spaß, Jungs!
programme.desc: Eine Freundin eines alten Bekannten von Becker ist in der Stadt. Er ahnt nicht, dass Nicky eigentlich sein alter Bekannter Chuck ist. Außerdem kämpft Reggie damit, Geheimnisse zu bewahren, und Margaret muss einen Freund wegen Geld zur Rede stellen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Ärzte unter sich
programme.desc: Becker wird angeschossen. Frances Fisher hat einen Gastauftritt als seine Ärztin.

programme.title: Becker DE: Beliebt bei Jung und Alt
programme.desc: Dr. Elizabeth Carson offenbart Becker, dass sie sich zu ihm hingezogen fühlt. Außerdem kämpfen Margaret und Linda darum, die Praxis am Laufen zu halten, während er sich von seiner Schussverletzung erholt.

programme.title: Becker DE: Schmerzen im Aspirin
programme.desc: Becker und Liz stellen fest, dass sie eine eigenartige Beziehung führen, weil sie beide in den Sachen des anderen herumschnüffeln. Außerdem gewinnt und verliert Bob mit Lottoscheinen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Nicht gut, aber besser
programme.desc: Wir erfahren, wie Jake erblindete und sehen, wie er beginnt, mit dem Unfall, seinem Freund und sich selbst zurechtzukommen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Harvey der Weihnachtsmann
programme.desc: Becker beginnt das Leben zu schätzen, nachdem er einen Abend im Leichenschauhaus verbrachte, um einen seiner Patienten zu identifizieren. Außerdem gibt Reggie ihre jährliche Weihnachtsfeier. Währenddessen wichteln Linda und Margaret Weihnachtsgeschenke.

programme.title: Becker DE: Der scheinheilige Schwur
programme.desc: Becker kümmert sich um das Chaos auf der Arbeit, während Reggie für einen Test lernt und Margaret einer Testamentseröffnung beiwohnt.

programme.title: Becker DE: Das Gerücht
programme.desc: Becker beginnt eine geheimnisvolle neue Ernährungsumstellung, um seinen Cholesterinspiegel zu senken. Das führt dazu, dass die Leute über seinen unbekannten Zustand sprechen.

programme.title: Becker DE: Ein Mann sieht rot
programme.desc: Becker wird wegen Konfrontation verhaftet und muss gemeinnützige Arbeit leisten. Außerdem zieht Bob bei Linda ein.

programme.title: Becker DE: Biker John
programme.desc: Becker fühlt sich alt, nachdem er seinen Führerschein erneuern musste. Um seine Gefühle zu bekämpfen, kauft er das Motorrad eines Patienten. In seiner Wohnung verletzt er sich, als er vorgibt, damit zu fahren. Auf Margarets Wunsch hin verkauft er es.

programme.title: Becker DE: Die Salz-Krise
programme.desc: Becker versucht, mit einer Dinnerparty gesellig zu werden. Liz gibt sich große Mühe, doch die einzigen Anwesenden sind Reggie, ihr College-Freund und ein Mann, den niemand kennt.

programme.title: Becker DE: Für wen die Gebühren anfallen

programme.desc: Becker teilt irrtümlicherweise der falschen Familie mit, dass ihr Vater gestorben ist. Außerdem setzen sich Margaret und Linda mit Lindas depressiver Freundin Lynda auseinander.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex y es alguien muy esperado, pero todo lo que ha ocurrido en las vacaciones impide la reconciliación. Spencer está decepcionado de Oscar y Norma tiene cruda moral. Renata ve con cariño a Elías y Sargento se pone celoso.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex
programme.desc: Llega un nuevo ex que causa celos. Renata llora por Sargento, Rocío discute otra vez con Alejandro y sobrepasa sus límites. Hay una votación sorpresa y una decisión que deja a todos en shock. Ernesto quiere dar el siguiente paso con Montse.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex
programme.desc: Llega a la villa un nuevo ex y viene dispuesto a la reconciliación. Rocío no está interesada en Daniel, Renata y Sargento dejan que el amor fluya, y Montse y Ernesto anuncian su noviazgo. En la fiesta, Brenda completa su venganza.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex
programme.desc: Hay un nuevo ex y quiere recuperar a su antigua pareja, pero la cita cambia los planes. Una pareja termina antes sus vacaciones y Spencer se abre con Norma. Rocío hace una visita exprés a la Master Suite. Hay una ceremonia de compromiso.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex
programme.desc: Entra de sorpresa el último ex y todos quedan en shock. La fiesta de compromiso cierra con broche de oro en la Master Suite. Unos videos le abren los ojos a varios y, en la fiesta final, recuerdan los mejores momentos de las vacaciones.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Los influencers llegan a la Villa y lo que promete ser el momento ideal para comenzar las vacaciones, se ve interrumpido por la Tablet del Terror.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Diana amenaza a Frida tras su nuevo romance con Brandon. La Sala Tornado abre sus puertas y eligen a ciegas quién es el próximo EX en llegar. Suavecito sufre por el romance de Kim e Ian.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban y Aylin comienzan un romance. La llegada del nuevo EX sorprende a todos y la Tablet los manda a una cita de tres. La Sala Tornado pone las cartas sobre la mesa. Brandon toma una decisión importante.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La tensión parece calmarse tras la reconciliación entre Diana y Brandon. Camilo y David tienen una plática sincera y Kelly aclara sus intenciones con Karen. Daphne saca su furia y arremte contra Aylin.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Dos nuevos EX llegan a la Villa y se desatan los celos. Diana deja las cosas claras con Brandon en la Love Suite. Todos disfrutan de un día fuera de la Villa y el alcohol les ayuda a encararse.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Esteban busca hacer un trío y Aylin busca exclusividad. Llega un nuevo EX y hace que Frida respire de nuevo. Diana esta insegura de Brandon. Kelly es mas territorial con Robbie por culpa de Michelle.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: En medio de una fiesta, Camilo se casa con David en el peor momento y se abre la Sala Tornado desatando nuevos conflictos. Kim va por Ian, mientras que Suavecito llama a no engancharse con sus parejas.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Karen y Suavecito se van a una cita y se desatan los celos incontrolables de Kim y se despide de Ian. La peluca María José trae revelaciones importantes y llega un nuevo EX a saldar cuentas.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Frida y Brandon se reencuentran y Diana toma cartas en el asunto. Kim y Suavecito se besan apasionadamente pero Ian tiene un As bajo la manga. La llegada de un nuevo Ex y alguien es expulsado.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: La Sala Tornado llama a votaciones. Algunos se van de fiesta a una casa flotante. La salida de Daphne se convierte en el pretexto para hacer explotar una bomba de tiempo que provoca una gran pelea.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: Una dinámica los obliga a decirse las cosas de frente. Michelle y Kelly arreglan sus diferencias en la Sala Tornado. Salen por grupos a disfrutar de Colombia. Festejan el cumpleaños de Diana.

programme.title: Mi último deseo
programme.desc: Naz se ecuentra en casa y fuera de peligro. Ege anda preocupado por su crítica situación financiera y su mala relación con Lale. Kerim está en búsqueda de su hija, sin ninguna respuesta. Entretanto, Lale solo intenta poder volver con sus hijas.

programme.title: La dama rebelde
programme.desc: Gullu llega a las tierras de Muzzafer en contra de su voluntad y ella no reparará en hacérselo saber a todos. Para cuidar a su hermano, Halide hace lo posible por convencer a Zaloglu de llevarse a Gullu a la ciudad.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 407
programme.desc: Vi träffar Maria, som efter en bröstoperation drabbades av stora abscesser och hål ända fram till implantatet.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 311
programme.desc: Vi möter Maria som efter 11 bröstoperationer fått vad hon själv kallar världens fulaste bröst.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 807
programme.desc: 2010 åkte Tina till Thailand för att få sina bröstimplantat utbytta, men operationen gick inte som förväntat och idag har hon smärta som hindrar henne från att dansa.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 302
programme.desc: Två av Danmarks bästa plastikkirurger hjälper människor som råkat ut för misslyckade ingrepp. Vi möter Isabella, en 18-åring vars bröstförstoring blev en total katastrof.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 803
programme.desc: Natasha är en före detta modell. År 2013 fick hon implantaten i sina silikonbröst utbytta, men operationen gick inte som planerat och därför har hon nu två mycket olika bröst.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 806
programme.desc: Tinas mardröm började 2015 när hon fick en tumör på näsan som fortsatte att växa. Hon måste genomgå strålbehandling för att få bort den, men tumören lämnar också ett hål som måste stängas.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 303
programme.desc: Vi möter Doris som har varit med om en våldsam busskrasch. Idag kämpar hon med extrema konsekvenser av den plastikoperation som skulle rädda hennes utseende efter olyckan.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 101
programme.desc: Två av Danmarks toppkirurger möter offer för misslyckad plastikkirurgi. Bland andra träffar vi Mille, som jagar drömmen om perfektion, och Joan, som tycker att hon har förlorat sin kvinnlighet.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 103
programme.desc: Ivanas liv hängde på en skör tråd under hennes plastikoperation som kostade ett astronomiskt belopp. Lotte döljer sin sönderopererade mage bakom tatueringar. Kan kirurgerna hjälpa dem

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 703
programme.desc: Den före detta burleskdansösen Grethe fick båda sina bröst bortopererade 2011 som en del av sin behandling för bröstcancer.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 312
programme.desc: Vi möter Angelina gjort bröstkirurgi 11 gånger. I sökandet efter drömbrösten reser hon till Miami, där hon lägger in 1500 ml i brösten och det slutar med att de blir så stora att de spricker.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 308
programme.desc: I det här avsnittet möter vi Britt, som är upprörd både över utseendet på hennes bröst och den smärta hon fått efter en mastektomi och drömmer om ett bröllop med fina bröst och utan smärta.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 306
programme.desc: Vi möter Jeanette som känner sig som en försökskanin efter en rad misslyckade operationer.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 705
programme.desc: Som 21-åring drömmer Simone om runda och fylliga bröst. Hon genomgår en bröstförstoring som slutar med en inflammation varpå hon gör flera omoperationer, innan hon säger stopp till kirurgen.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 406
programme.desc: I det här avsnittet möter vi Anita som vaknade upp med större bröst än vad hon hade kommit överens om med kirurgen och som nu känner sig som en miniversion av Linse Kessler.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 102
programme.desc: Två av landets bästa kirurger är redo att hjälpa människor som fått betala ett högt pris för sin jakt efter ungdom och skönhet. Ta reda på om dessa misslyckade operationer kan korrigeras.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 404
programme.desc: Vi möter Maria, som efter en bröstförstoring fick ett hål ända upp till implantatet, och Casper, som hela sitt liv har blivit mobbad på grund av sin näsa.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 404
programme.desc: Vi möter Maria, som efter en bröstförstoring fick ett hål ända upp till implantatet, och Casper, som hela sitt liv har blivit mobbad på grund av sin näsa.

programme.title: Skönhetsfällan Danmark: Avsnitt 901
programme.desc: Som tonåring var Melissa ledsen över sin killiga kropp och beslutade sig för att genomgå tre bröstförstoringsoperationer. Men nu är hon fast i ett smärthelvete som är på väg att göra henne morfinberoende.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 310
programme.desc: Vi møter bodybuilderen Ulla som ønsket seg kvinnelige bryster, men som nå har så store implantater at hun har vanskelig for å trene. Patrik har fått fjernet hud på magen, men er misfornøyd.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 606
programme.desc: Claudia går ned 100 kilo og får deretter fjernet overflødig hud. For å avslutte reisen mot en kropp som Claudia kan føle seg stolt av, bestemte hun seg for å gjøre en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: I dag møter vi bl.a. Jane, som ikke lenger har lyst på sex på grunn av de stygge brystene sine, og Julie, som misliker seg selv på grunn av de store arrene hun fikk etter en brystreduksjon.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeannes bryster hindrer henne i å leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer seg over beina og bruker enormt mye tid og energi på å skjule dem.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 308
programme.desc: Lizette sitter igjen med et knallhardt bryst etter en forstørrende operasjon, mens Diana går med voldsomme smerter etter en brystreduksjon. Begge håper de å få hjelp av de erfarne kirurgene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 503
programme.desc: Under sin siste fødsel gjennomgikk Sonja et akutt keisersnitt som, noe utradisjonelt, ble kuttet vertikalt på Sonjas mage. Sonjas navle ble kuttet opp, og resultatet er til en stor ulempe for henne.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 309
programme.desc: Ditte har brukt 120 000 kroner på å få større bryster - som er asymmetriske. Eva har fått utført en brystreduksjon, men føler seg nå mer maskulin enn feminin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 802
programme.desc: For første gang i programmets historie har både mor og datter havnet i et plastisk mareritt, og begge trenger hjelp.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Isabella, som fikk utført brystforstørring som 18-åring for å ligne Pamela Anderson, men som i dag sitter igjen med to steinharde kuler på brystkassen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 104
programme.desc: Pernille får kick av å få utført plastisk kirurgi, men armene hennes er vansiret av store arr. Mille drømmer om at de feilopererte brystene hennes blir fiksa før bryllupet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 205
programme.desc: I denne episoden møter vi bl.a. Dianne, som fikk fjernet brystene grunnet mistanke om kreft, men som nå lever alene fordi hun føler seg utilpass, og Anette, som fikk foretatt en hudoperasjon i utlandet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Doris var med i en alvorlig bussulykke og i dag sliter hun med ekstreme bivirkninger av en operasjon som egentlig skulle ha reddet utseendet hennes etter ulykken.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 601
programme.desc: Charlotte fikk fjernet brystimplantatene sine på grunn av komplikasjoner. Etter det fikk hun en protese for å kompensere for størrelsen på brystene, men protesen er både ubehagelig og upraktisk.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 106
programme.desc: Vi møter fire personer som har gjort plastikkirugi som har fått ødeleggende konsekvenser: blant annet Lone som lever i frykt for at implantatene hennes er kreftfremkallende.

programme.desc: Nanna har hatt flere brystoperasjoner og korrigeringer, men sitter nå igjen med deformerte, harde bryster. På grunn av operasjonene vil hun ikke at noen skal se henne naken.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 302
programme.desc: Fejlslagne plastikoperationer har givet fire kvinder ar på både krop og sjæl. Vi møder Isabella, en 18-årig pige, hvis brystforstørrelse var en total katastrofe.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 306
programme.desc: Vi møder bl.a. Jeanette, der føler sig som en forsøgskanin efter en række mislykkede operationer og Shahin, som lever i et smertehelvede efter en ansigtsløftning, hun blev overtalt til på en klinik i Litauen.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 902
programme.desc: Efter en brystoperation har Samantha tunge, smertende bryster og et forhold, der skranter. Allan har efterfølgende udtrykt uenighed i Samanthas udlægning af, hvorfor forholdet stoppede.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 103
programme.desc: Ivana, der ikke bare endte med at bruge en million kroner i USA, men hvor lægerne tog en fatal beslutning under hendes narkose, Lotte, der har forsøgt at skjule sit ødelagte maveskind bag tatoveringer.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 310
programme.desc: Vi møder bodybuilderen Ulla, der ønskede sig bryster, som skulle få hende til at se kvindelig ud, men som nu har fået så store implantater, at hun har svært ved at træne.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 905
programme.desc: Melanie og Monas operationer hæmmer dem i at være intime med deres allerkæreste. Karina fik opgraderet til Barbie-bryster, hvorfra der nu siver hytteost-lignende materie ud af brystvorterne.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 504
programme.desc: Efter et større vægttab har Birgit store mængder overskydende hud på maven og hun beslutter sig derfor at få fortaget en hudreduktion, men hun var knap nok udskrevet, før hun vidste, at noget var galt.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 601
programme.desc: Charlotte får i 2009 fjernet sine implantater i brysterne på grund af komplikationer. Efterfølgende får hun støbt en silikoneprotese, som kan kompensere for den varierende størrelse på brysterne, men protesen er både generende og upraktisk.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 904
programme.desc: Jeanne får uønskede og sårende tilråb for sine nye bryster, og de hæmmer hende fra at leve et normalt liv. Gitte skammer sig over sine ben og bruger enormt meget tid og energi på at kamuflere dem.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 506
programme.desc: I 2010 får Birthe indsat saltvandsimplanater i stedet for de almindelige silikoneimplantater. 5 år senere vågner hun op til et skræmmende syn - hendes ene implantat er væk.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 604
programme.desc: 61-årige Lis har gennem livet ønsket at ændre på sine små bryster . Derfor vælger at få foretaget en brystforstørrende operation, men kort tid efter oplever hun, at det har konsekvenser for hendes sexliv.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 703
programme.desc: Den tidligere burlesque-danser Grethe fik i 2011 fjernet begge sine bryster som led i hendes behandling mod brystkræft.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt: Episode 701
programme.desc: Efter en voldsom ulykke, hvor Dan falder ned fra et tag og lander på ansigtet, bliver han opereret to gange for at rette op på næsen.

programme.title: Mit plastikmareridt
programme.desc: Mød Melissa, der faldt i tilbudsfælden på nettet og sidder tilbage med et resultat som hun fortryder inderligt.
